message:
fix(connectors): schema mismatches, pagination, rate limit, idempotency, C3.4 tokens

Salesforce: Fix leads.convert and reports.get output schemas declaring
snake_case fields (account_id, report_metadata) when the API returns
camelCase (accountId, reportMetadata) — agents following the schema
would fail to access response fields.

Intercom: Add missing starting_after pagination cursor to contacts.list
input_schema — the invoke method extracts it but agents had no way to
know the field existed from introspection.

Obsidian: Add missing created field to notes.get output_schema (the Note
struct serializes it but the schema omitted it). Fix notes.create
idempotency from Strict to None — second call fails with AlreadyExists.

HubSpot: Increase rate limit retry-after default from 10s to 60s to
match HubSpot's recommended backoff window.

Zendesk: Add C3.4 CapabilityConstraints to test token generation,
fixing 2 failing tests (constraint-denied errors).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
